logline: A neurotic chef opens a restaurant in his small hometown and struggles to impress his harshest critic — his mother.
Two rival food truck owners are forced to share a parking spot outside a busy office building.
A retired clown tries to reconnect with his adult children who are embarrassed by his past career.
An overachieving suburban mom accidentally joins a competitive bowling league and discovers her hidden talent.
A tech billionaire loses everything and must move in with his down-to-earth sister in rural Ohio.
Three middle-aged women start a true crime podcast and accidentally solve an actual mystery in their neighborhood.
A dog trainer falls for a client whose unruly golden retriever keeps sabotaging their budding romance.
A socially awkward librarian becomes an unlikely internet celebrity after a video of her speed-reading goes viral.
Two best friends open a bakery together, only to discover they have completely opposite ideas about everything.
A former child actor tries to reclaim fame by auditioning for roles at his local community theater.
An uptight accountant is assigned to audit a chaotic family-run circus and falls in love with the tightrope walker.
A group of retirees forms a boy band and unexpectedly becomes a hit on social media.
A workaholic lawyer is forced to take a sabbatical and moves to a quirky small town where nothing makes sense.
A competitive dad trains obsessively for his son's school talent show after promising to juggle fire.
A wedding planner's own engagement falls apart as she plans her biggest event of the year.
A grumpy old man and a cheerful young woman are paired together in a community service program.
A failed magician becomes an elementary school teacher and uses his tricks to keep unruly students in line.
Three siblings must renovate their late grandmother's crumbling house in order to sell it and split the inheritance.
A couple discovers their smart home AI has developed a passive-aggressive personality and starts taking sides in their arguments.
A substitute teacher accidentally signs up for the school's most competitive academic decathlon team.
An ambitious intern at a fashion magazine discovers her boss has been stealing designs from unknown artists.
A small-town mayor tries to attract a major corporation to town while keeping the quirky locals from scaring them off.
A by-the-book park ranger must team up with a free-spirited wildlife photographer to find a missing rare bird.
A perpetually single woman bets her friends she can get a date using only advice from 1950s etiquette books.
A hypochondriac doctor at a rural clinic has to deal with patients who are far healthier than he is.
A competitive knitting club recruits a retired NFL linebacker and must decide whether winning is worth the drama.
Two neighbors feud over a property line while their teenage kids secretly fall in love.
A self-help guru is forced to attend his own seminar after his assistant accidentally registers him as a participant.
A newly single dad learns to cook by watching his daughter's favorite cooking show and secretly applying the lessons.
A cynical comedy writer is assigned to write a feel-good holiday special and rediscovers his love of storytelling.
A traveling salesman's GPS keeps sending him to the wrong towns, each one more bizarre than the last.
An overprotective mother installs a tracking app on her adult son's phone, leading to a series of comic misunderstandings.
A competitive trivia team adds a new member who turns out to know everything about every subject except pop culture.
A by-the-book HR manager is put in charge of planning the office holiday party after the last one ended in disaster.
A lifelong bachelor inherits his sister's cat and discovers he prefers the cat to most people he knows.
A pair of con artists try to run a scheme in a small town but keep getting outsmarted by the locals.
A newly promoted manager discovers that her entire team has been secretly running a side business from the office.
A washed-up sports commentator is given one last chance when he's assigned to cover the local youth soccer league.
An optimistic mail carrier decides to personally solve every problem she learns about on her daily route.
A professional matchmaker struggles to find love for herself after her algorithm keeps matching her with completely wrong men.
A buttoned-up English professor goes undercover at a romance novel convention to research popular fiction.
A woman who has never broken a rule in her life accidentally shoplifts a candy bar and spirals into full panic mode.
Two divorced parents share custody of their kids and accidentally share the same dating app.
A competitive gardener goes to extreme lengths to win the neighborhood beautification contest for the tenth year in a row.
A deadpan office temp discovers she has a talent for crisis management when the company's CEO has a public meltdown.
A children's book author who hates children is forced to teach a creative writing workshop at an elementary school.
A small-town diner owner starts a catering business to save money, but her first client is the mayor's wedding.
A passive-aggressive family goes to extreme lengths to avoid having a direct conversation during the holidays.
A fitness influencer's carefully curated life falls apart after a candid photo goes viral showing her eating a whole pizza.
A group of coworkers who have never met in person finally come face to face at the annual company retreat.
